code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(target)
      match find_index(nums, target)
      when Some(i)
        print("index=#{i}")
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
